title: 1 step DFU - Houston screen during CC update (during Update all)
scenario: "Update All" DFU on Voyager Free 60+ shows Houston error screen when earbuds are placed in charging case during case firmware update
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on your mobile device.
Ensure Voyager Free 60+ earbuds are connected to the app.
Navigate to the Home screen and verify the earbuds and charging case are detected.
Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) by tapping 'Update All' (1-step DFU process).
While the charging case firmware update is in progress, place the earbuds back into the charging case.
Observe the app screen during and after placing the earbuds in the case.
expected: The firmware update should continue normally or pause gracefully without displaying an error screen.
